description: Hot-swap, input protection, PMBus telemetry controller for battery input
notes: Battery A and Battery B each use one controller

description: 100V Linear FET for hot-swap, battery protection, and eFuse paths
notes: Back-to-back structure and parallel count depend on final current and SOA

description: Digital power controller for foot and arm 24V rail generation and telemetry
notes: Foot and arm 24V DC/DC rails are separated

description: Single-channel gate driver for DC/DC power stage
notes: Two DC/DC rails; quantity depends on topology and number of phases/switches

description: 100V OptiMOS power MOSFET for 24V DC/DC stage
notes: Two DC/DC rails; quantity depends on topology, phase count, and paralleling

description: Power PROFET+ 24/48V smart high-side switch with diagnosis and current sense
notes: Used as provisional 40A-class foot drive output switch; thermal validation required

description: Power PROFET+ 24/48V smart high-side switch with diagnosis and current sense
notes: Low-current provisional arm output switch; reselect after total ARES X arm current across M3508-class actuator axes is estimated

description: Multiple-output PMIC for 3.3V MCU supply, transceivers, watchdog, and reset monitoring
notes: XBee may need a separate 3.3V regulator depending on current

description: STM32G4 MCU candidate for telemetry, state machine, ADC, UART, and CAN control
notes: Exact STM32 package can change with IO count and layout

description: CAN FD SIC transceiver usable for initial CAN 1Mbps and future CAN FD expansion
notes: Use with CAN termination, TVS, and connector defined in board spec

description: 5V coreless current sensor with +/-82A range, analog output, overcurrent output, and diagnostics
notes: For Battery A/B and foot output independent current logging if internal diagnostics are insufficient

description: 5V coreless current sensor for lower-current arm output measurement
notes: Use only if total arm output current fits the medium range; otherwise use the higher-range current sensor

description: XBee module for initial remote ON/OFF and telemetry path
notes: Exact XBee variant and antenna depend on existing rover radio design

description: Physical fuse or equivalent protection near each battery input
notes: Rating depends on final battery and load current

description: 120 ohm termination option, TVS, common-mode choke, connector, and passives
notes: Finalize with rover CAN wiring and shield policy

description: Bulk capacitors, voltage dividers, sense filters, gate resistors, and pull resistors
notes: Values depend on final two-rail DC/DC topology and layout
